posts.author: Chester (Chester Alvin Escorpiso)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, I wish there was a way to trigger an automation from an update that is posted within a status. So here’s what I’m thinking

image994×659 35.5 KB

Currently, there is an option where an automation is triggered when an update is posted and the status of an item is something.

image1161×591 15 KB

But that’s different when an update is created in a certain status. I hope that makes sense. And if there’s a way to do that already, please point me to the right direction.

Thank you!
